title: symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. tenuipes
intro: Symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. tenuipes, also known as the narrow-leaved white panicle aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. tenuipes include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
